calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Peppina Thompson, #7433.

Timothy O'Leary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Schapiro-Thorn, Inc., a California corporation.
Suzie Thorn was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Richard T. Rushing.
Default entered against defendant on September 18, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed on April 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Schapiro-Thorn, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Richard T. Rushing as follows:

Damages/Principal - $305,815.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $30,246.00.
Costs - $420.00, for a total of $336,481.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
